sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', order_date) AS month, SUM(amount) AS revenue FROM orders WHERE status = 'completed' GROUP BY 1
description: Total revenue from completed orders, grouped by month. Excludes refunds and cancellations.

sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', order_date) AS month, SUM(amount) AS revenue FROM orders GROUP BY 1
description: Revenue per month across all orders placed, including pending and refunded.

sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', order_date) AS month, SUM(amount - refund_amount) AS revenue FROM orders WHERE status IN ('completed','shipped') GROUP BY 1
description: Net monthly revenue after subtracting refunds, for completed and shipped orders.

sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM events WHERE event_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
description: Distinct users with any event in the trailing 30 days.

sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM events WHERE DATE_TRUNC('month', event_date) = DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)
description: Monthly active users: distinct users active in the current calendar month.

sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM events WHERE event_type = 'login' AND event_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
description: Users who logged in at least once in the last 30 days. Only counts login events.

sql: SELECT (COUNT(CASE WHEN cancelled THEN 1 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(*)) FROM subscriptions WHERE period = 'last_month'
description: Share of subscriptions cancelled last month over total subscriptions.

sql: SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT churned_user_id) * 1.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT user_id)) FROM user_activity WHERE month = 'last_month'
description: Fraction of users who became inactive last month relative to all users.

sql: SELECT (COUNT(CASE WHEN converted THEN 1 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(*)) FROM leads
description: Leads that converted to paying customers over all leads, all-time.

sql: SELECT (COUNT(CASE WHEN purchased THEN 1 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT session_id)) FROM web_sessions WHERE date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days'
description: Share of website sessions in the last 7 days that ended in a purchase.

sql: SELECT SUM(amount) / COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) FROM orders WHERE status = 'completed'
SELECT SUM(amount - refund_amount) / COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) FROM orders
description: Average order value net of refunds across all orders.
